person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
"Ingefred Assersdatter, datter af Asser Rig. Ingefred, den eneste kendte søster af Absalon og antagelig den unavngivne søster gift med Peder, som Absalon ifølge Saxo gør ophold hos under sin flugt i 1157 på vej fra Ramsø til Fjenneslev. Peder kaldes ofte af Borup i fremstillinger måske på grund af Knytlinga sagas beskrivelse af flugten, hvor man drager fra Ramsø til Borup. Ifølge Saxo aktiv Valdemar-partiet efter blodgildet i 1157."
https://da.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hvide#Asser-linjen

zh.lifeSummary: 當Peder Pedersen Borup於1130年之前出生在丹麥洛斯吉爾德拉姆奧波盧普時，他的父親Peder Pedersen49歲，母親Ukendt30歲。他去世於1199年在丹麥普ae斯奧比格桑可特 莫坦斯ae斯特維德，埋葬在丹麥普ae斯奧比格桑可特 莫坦斯ae斯特維德。

nameMeanings.name: Borup
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Bjorn, Niels, Oluf.

Danish: habitational name from any of various places called Borup. The placename is derived from a Danish word meaning ‘rim, edge’ or from the personal name Bowi + Old Norse thorp ‘outlying farmstead, dwelling’.

variants.name: Bearup
meanings: English (northern) and Scottish: habitational name from Bearhope, a lost place in the Scottish borders, composed of the English elements bere ‘barley’ or bare ‘bare’ and hop ‘remote valley’.
Possibly also an Americanized form of Danish   Borup  .

nameMeanings.name: Peder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Pedersen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Niels, Bjorn, Knud, Nils, Anders, Jorgen, Egil, Einer, Knut, Peer.
Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Peder (see Peter ). This surname is also found in northern Germany. Compare Petersen 2 and Peterson 1.

variants.name: Pederson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Nels, Hjalmer, Obert, Ove, Hilmer, Iver, Knud, Lars, Selmer, Alf, Anders.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Pedersen or of the Swedish cognate Pedersson.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Peder Pedersen Borup was born before 1130, in Borup, Ramsø, Roskilde, Denmark, his father, Peder Pedersen, was 49 and his mother, Ukendt, was 30. He died in 1199, in Næstved, Sankt Mortens, Tybjerg, Præstø, Denmark, and was buried in Næstved, Sankt Mortens, Tybjerg, Præstø, Denmark.

ko.lifeSummary: Peder Pedersen Borup(이)가 1130년 이전 덴마크 로스킬드 램스o 버루프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peder Pedersen(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Ukendt(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1199년 덴마크 프ae스트o 타이브j르그 산k트 모르텐스 ae스트브드에서 사망했으며 덴마크 프ae스트o 타이브j르그 산k트 모르텐스 ae스트브드에 묻혔다.

Ele faleceu em 1199, em Næstved, Sankt Mortens, Tybjerg, Præstø, Dinamarca, e foi sepultado em Næstved, Sankt Mortens, Tybjerg, Præstø, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peder Pedersen Borup родился перед 1130 г. в местности боруп, рамсo, роскаилд, Дания, его отцу по имени Peder Pedersen было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Ukendt, 30. Он умер в 1199 г. в местности нaeствед, санкт мортенс, тибджирг, прaeстo, Дания и был похоронен в местности нaeствед, санкт мортенс, тибджирг, прaeстo, Дания.
